---
title: "Publications"
toc: false
execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
---

```{=html}
<header class="pub-head">
  <div class="pub-head-kicker">Research output</div>
  <h1 class="pub-head-title">Publications</h1>
  <p class="pub-head-sub">Peer-reviewed papers and preprints from CompOmics group members. For a complete list, see our <a href="https://scholar.google.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar</a> page or individual <a href="https://orcid.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ORCID profiles</a>.</p>
</header>
```

```{python}
import html
import json
import os
import re
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML

project_root = Path(os.environ.get("QUARTO_PROJECT_DIR") or Path.cwd())
if not (project_root / "data" / "publications.json").exists():
    # fallback: walk up from the working directory to find the project root
    for cand in [Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents]:
        if (cand / "data" / "publications.json").exists():
            project_root = cand
            break
pub_file = project_root / "data" / "publications.json"

if not pub_file.exists():
    display(HTML(
        '<div class="callout callout-warning"><p>No publications data found. '
        'Run <code>python publications/fetch_publications.py</code> to populate '
        '<code>data/publications.json</code>, then re-render this page.</p></div>'
    ))
else:
    publications = json.loads(pub_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))

    # Build set of lowercase team member name strings from team profile titles.
    # Used as fallback when CrossRef does not supply per-author ORCIDs.
    def _load_group_names():
        names = set()
        team_dir = project_root / "team"
        for path in team_dir.glob("*.qmd"):
            if path.name == "index.qmd":
                continue
            text = path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
            m = re.search(r'^title:\s*["\']?(.+?)["\']?\s*$', text, re.MULTILINE)
            if m:
                names.add(m.group(1).strip().lower())
        return names

    # Current CompOmics members (keep in sync with team/index.qmd). Used both for
    # author highlighting and for the "by person" filter dropdown.
    MEMBERS = [
        "Lennart Martens", "Sakina Bombaywala", "Robbin Bouwmeester", "Tine Claeys",
        "Arthur Declercq", "Ralf Gabriels", "Alexander Kensert", "Enrico Massignani",
        "Pathmanaban Ramasamy", "Tim Van Den Bossche", "Pieter Verschaffelt",
        "Toon Callens", "Robbe Devreese", "Sander Heyndrickx", "Sude Güneş",
        "Caroline Jachmann", "Xuxa Malliet", "Alireza Nameni", "Harikrishnan Ramadasan",
        "Sam Van Puyenbroeck", "Lyudmila Kovalchuke", "Patricia Lefèvre",
        "Natalia Tichshenko", "Kevin Velghe", "Daria Fijalkowska", "Jasper Zuallaert",
    ]

    # names for bold highlighting = team qmd titles (if any) ∪ the member list above
    group_names = _load_group_names() | {m.lower() for m in MEMBERS}

    _member_tokens = [(m, set(m.lower().split())) for m in MEMBERS]

    def matched_members(authors):
        """Return the member names that appear among a publication's authors."""
        author_token_sets = [set(a.lower().split()) for a in authors]
        hits = []
        for name, mtok in _member_tokens:
            if any(mtok.issubset(at) for at in author_token_sets):
                hits.append(name)
        return hits

    def _is_group_member(author_name, author_orcid, group_orcids_set):
        # Primary: ORCID match (requires re-running the fetch script)
        if author_orcid and author_orcid in group_orcids_set:
            return True
        # Fallback: all tokens of a group member name must appear in the author name tokens
        author_tokens = set(author_name.lower().split())
        return any(set(gn.split()).issubset(author_tokens) for gn in group_names)

    AUTHOR_LIMIT = 8  # authors shown before the "+ N more" toggle

    def format_authors(authors, author_orcids, group_orcids):
        group_set = set(group_orcids or [])
        orcids = author_orcids or [None] * len(authors)
        labelled = []
        for name, orcid in zip(authors, orcids):
            safe = html.escape(name)
            if _is_group_member(name, orcid, group_set):
                labelled.append(f"<strong>{safe}</strong>")
            else:
                labelled.append(safe)
        if len(labelled) <= AUTHOR_LIMIT:
            return ", ".join(labelled)
        shown = ", ".join(labelled[:AUTHOR_LIMIT])
        rest = ", ".join(labelled[AUTHOR_LIMIT:])
        n = len(labelled) - AUTHOR_LIMIT
        return (
            f'{shown}<span class="pub-authors-rest" hidden>, {rest}</span>'
            f'<button type="button" class="pub-authors-toggle" '
            f'data-more="+{n} more" data-less="show less">+{n} more</button>'
        )

    def format_location(pub):
        parts = []
        if pub.get("volume"):
            loc = pub["volume"]
            if pub.get("issue"):
                loc += f"({pub['issue']})"
            parts.append(loc)
        if pub.get("pages"):
            parts.append(pub["pages"])
        return ":".join(parts)

    # Preprint detection — by DOI prefix or journal/server name.
    PREPRINT_DOI_PREFIXES = (
        "10.1101",    # bioRxiv / medRxiv (Cold Spring Harbor)
        "10.26434",   # ChemRxiv
        "10.21203",   # Research Square
        "10.20944",   # Preprints.org
        "10.31219",   # OSF Preprints
        "10.31234",   # PsyArXiv
        "10.48550",   # arXiv
        "10.64898",   # bioRxiv (newer prefix)
    )
    PREPRINT_JOURNAL_HINTS = (
        "biorxiv", "medrxiv", "chemrxiv", "arxiv", "research square",
        "preprints.org", "ssrn", "osf", "preprint",
    )

    def is_preprint(doi, journal):
        d = (doi or "").lower()
        j = (journal or "").lower()
        if any(d.startswith(p) for p in PREPRINT_DOI_PREFIXES):
            return True
        return any(h in j for h in PREPRINT_JOURNAL_HINTS)

    def build_citation(authors, year, title, journal, location, doi):
        authors_txt = ", ".join(authors)
        parts = [authors_txt] if authors_txt else []
        parts.append(f"({year})." if year else "")
        parts.append(f"{title}.")
        venue = journal + ((" " + location) if location else "") if journal else location
        if venue:
            parts.append(f"{venue}.")
        if doi:
            parts.append(f"https://doi.org/{doi}")
        return " ".join(p for p in parts if p)

    by_year = {}
    for pub in publications:
        year = pub.get("year") or 0
        by_year.setdefault(year, []).append(pub)

    years_sorted = sorted(by_year.keys(), reverse=True)

    lines = []

    # ── Toolbar: search + year filter chips ──────────────────────────────────
    lines.append('<div class="pub-toolbar">')
    lines.append(
        '<div class="pub-search">'
        '<i class="bi bi-search pub-search-icon" aria-hidden="true"></i>'
        '<input type="search" id="pub-search-input" class="pub-search-input" '
        'placeholder="Search title, author, journal…" autocomplete="off" '
        'spellcheck="false" aria-label="Search publications">'
        '<button type="button" class="pub-search-clear" id="pub-search-clear" '
        'aria-label="Clear search" hidden>&times;</button>'
        '</div>'
    )
    # person dropdown (current members, alphabetical by surname)
    lines.append('<div class="pub-person">')
    lines.append('<i class="bi bi-person pub-person-icon" aria-hidden="true"></i>')
    lines.append('<select id="pub-person-select" class="pub-person-select" aria-label="Filter by person">')
    lines.append('<option value="">All people</option>')
    for name in sorted(MEMBERS, key=lambda n: n.split()[-1].lower()):
        val = html.escape(name.lower(), quote=True)
        lines.append(f'<option value="{val}">{html.escape(name)}</option>')
    lines.append('</select>')
    lines.append('</div>')

    # year chips — individual chips for >= 2016, everything older folded into "< 2016"
    YEAR_CAP = 2016
    lines.append('<div class="pub-chips" role="group" aria-label="Filter by year">')
    lines.append('<button type="button" class="pub-chip is-active" data-year="all">All</button>')
    has_pre_cap = False
    for year in years_sorted:
        if isinstance(year, int) and year >= YEAR_CAP:
            lines.append(f'<button type="button" class="pub-chip" data-year="{year}">{year}</button>')
        else:
            has_pre_cap = True
    if has_pre_cap:
        lines.append(f'<button type="button" class="pub-chip" data-year="pre{YEAR_CAP}">&lt; {YEAR_CAP}</button>')
    lines.append('</div>')
    lines.append('</div>')

    lines.append('<div class="pub-countbar">')
    lines.append('<div class="pub-count" id="pub-count" aria-live="polite"></div>')
    lines.append('<div class="pub-active" id="pub-active" hidden></div>')
    lines.append('</div>')

    # ── Publication list, grouped by year ────────────────────────────────────
    lines.append('<div class="pub-list-wrap" id="pub-list">')
    for year in years_sorted:
        yval = str(year) if year else "unknown"
        ylabel = str(year) if year else "Unknown year"
        lines.append(f'<section class="pub-year-block" data-year="{yval}">')
        lines.append(f'<h2 class="pub-year">{ylabel}</h2>')
        lines.append('<ol class="pub-list">')
        for pub in by_year[year]:
            title = pub.get("title", "Untitled")
            doi = pub.get("doi", "")
            journal = pub.get("journal", "")
            authors_list = pub.get("authors", [])
            authors_str = format_authors(
                authors_list,
                pub.get("author_orcids", []),
                pub.get("group_orcids", []),
            )
            location = format_location(pub)

            title_safe = html.escape(title)
            title_html = (
                f'<a href="https://doi.org/{html.escape(doi)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">{title_safe}</a>'
                if doi else title_safe
            )

            preprint = is_preprint(doi, journal)

            # venue pill: journal + location (volume(issue):pages)
            venue_txt = journal + ((", " + location) if (journal and location) else (location or "")) if (journal or location) else ""
            venue_html = (
                f'<span class="pub-venue">{html.escape(venue_txt)}</span>' if venue_txt else ""
            )
            badge_html = (
                '<span class="pub-badge pub-badge-preprint">Preprint</span>' if preprint else ""
            )

            # searchable haystack (plain text, attribute-escaped)
            haystack = " ".join([title, " ".join(authors_list), journal, ylabel]).lower()
            haystack = html.escape(haystack, quote=True)

            # pipe-delimited member names for the person filter (with edge pipes)
            hits = matched_members(authors_list)
            members_attr = ("|" + "|".join(m.lower() for m in hits) + "|") if hits else ""
            members_attr = html.escape(members_attr, quote=True)

            citation = build_citation(authors_list, ylabel if year else "", title, journal, location, doi)
            cite_attr = html.escape(citation, quote=True)
            type_attr = "preprint" if preprint else "published"

            cite_btn = (
                f'<button type="button" class="pub-cite" data-citation="{cite_attr}" '
                f'title="Copy citation" aria-label="Copy citation">'
                f'<i class="bi bi-quote"></i></button>'
            )

            lines.append(
                f'<li class="pub-entry" data-year="{yval}" data-type="{type_attr}" '
                f'data-members="{members_attr}" data-search="{haystack}">'
                f'<div class="pub-entry-main">'
                f'<span class="pub-title">{title_html}</span>'
                f'<span class="pub-authors">{authors_str}</span>'
                f'<div class="pub-tags">{badge_html}{venue_html}</div>'
                f'</div>'
                f'{cite_btn}'
                f'</li>'
            )
        lines.append("</ol>")
        lines.append("</section>")
    lines.append("</div>")

    lines.append(
        '<div class="pub-empty" id="pub-empty" hidden>'
        '<i class="bi bi-search"></i><p>No publications match your search.</p>'
        '</div>'
    )

    display(HTML("\n".join(lines)))
```

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  const search = document.getElementById('pub-search-input');
  const clear = document.getElementById('pub-search-clear');
  const chips = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.pub-chip'));
  const personSel = document.getElementById('pub-person-select');
  const entries = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.pub-entry'));
  const blocks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.pub-year-block'));
  const countEl = document.getElementById('pub-count');
  const emptyEl = document.getElementById('pub-empty');
  const activeEl = document.getElementById('pub-active');
  const listWrap = document.getElementById('pub-list');
  if (!search || !countEl) return;

  let activeYear = 'all';
  let activePerson = '';
  let query = '';

  function yearLabel() {
    const chip = chips.find(function (c) { return c.dataset.year === activeYear; });
    return chip ? chip.textContent.trim() : activeYear;
  }

  function resetYear() {
    activeYear = 'all';
    chips.forEach(function (c) { c.classList.toggle('is-active', c.dataset.year === 'all'); });
  }
  function resetPerson() {
    activePerson = '';
    if (personSel) personSel.value = '';
  }
  function resetQuery() {
    query = '';
    search.value = '';
    if (clear) clear.hidden = true;
  }

  function buildActiveBar() {
    if (!activeEl) return;
    const bits = [];
    if (query) bits.push({ k: 'query', label: '“' + query + '”' });
    if (activePerson && personSel) bits.push({ k: 'person', label: personSel.selectedOptions[0].text });
    if (activeYear !== 'all') bits.push({ k: 'year', label: yearLabel() });

    if (!bits.length) { activeEl.hidden = true; activeEl.innerHTML = ''; return; }

    let html = '';
    bits.forEach(function (b) {
      html += '<button type="button" class="pub-active-tag" data-kind="' + b.k + '">'
        + b.label + '<i class="bi bi-x"></i></button>';
    });
    html += '<button type="button" class="pub-active-clear">Clear all</button>';
    activeEl.innerHTML = html;
    activeEl.hidden = false;
  }

  function yearMatches(y) {
    if (activeYear === 'all') return true;
    if (activeYear.indexOf('pre') === 0) {
      const cap = parseInt(activeYear.slice(3), 10);
      const n = parseInt(y, 10);
      return y === 'unknown' || (!isNaN(n) && n < cap);
    }
    return y === activeYear;
  }

  function apply() {
    let visible = 0;
    entries.forEach(function (e) {
      const okYear = yearMatches(e.dataset.year);
      const okQuery = !query || e.dataset.search.indexOf(query) !== -1;
      const okPerson = !activePerson || (e.dataset.members || '').indexOf('|' + activePerson + '|') !== -1;
      const show = okYear && okQuery && okPerson;
      e.classList.toggle('is-hidden', !show);
      if (show) visible += 1;
    });
    blocks.forEach(function (b) {
      b.classList.toggle('is-hidden', !b.querySelector('.pub-entry:not(.is-hidden)'));
    });
    countEl.textContent = visible + (visible === 1 ? ' publication' : ' publications');
    if (emptyEl) emptyEl.hidden = visible !== 0;
    buildActiveBar();
  }

  chips.forEach(function (chip) {
    chip.addEventListener('click', function () {
      chips.forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove('is-active'); });
      chip.classList.add('is-active');
      activeYear = chip.dataset.year;
      apply();
    });
  });

  if (personSel) {
    personSel.addEventListener('change', function () {
      activePerson = personSel.value;
      apply();
    });
  }

  search.addEventListener('input', function () {
    query = search.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (clear) clear.hidden = query === '';
    apply();
  });

  if (clear) {
    clear.addEventListener('click', function () {
      resetQuery();
      search.focus();
      apply();
    });
  }

  // active-filter bar: remove one filter or clear all
  if (activeEl) {
    activeEl.addEventListener('click', function (ev) {
      const clearAll = ev.target.closest('.pub-active-clear');
      if (clearAll) { resetQuery(); resetPerson(); resetYear(); apply(); return; }
      const tag = ev.target.closest('.pub-active-tag');
      if (!tag) return;
      const kind = tag.dataset.kind;
      if (kind === 'query') resetQuery();
      else if (kind === 'person') resetPerson();
      else if (kind === 'year') resetYear();
      apply();
    });
  }

  // list delegation: copy-citation + author "+N more" toggle
  if (listWrap) {
    listWrap.addEventListener('click', function (ev) {
      const toggle = ev.target.closest('.pub-authors-toggle');
      if (toggle) {
        const rest = toggle.parentElement.querySelector('.pub-authors-rest');
        if (rest) {
          const hidden = rest.hasAttribute('hidden');
          if (hidden) { rest.removeAttribute('hidden'); toggle.textContent = toggle.dataset.less; }
          else { rest.setAttribute('hidden', ''); toggle.textContent = toggle.dataset.more; }
        }
        return;
      }
      const cite = ev.target.closest('.pub-cite');
      if (cite) {
        const text = cite.dataset.citation || '';
        const icon = cite.querySelector('i');
        const done = function () {
          cite.classList.add('is-copied');
          if (icon) icon.className = 'bi bi-check-lg';
          setTimeout(function () {
            cite.classList.remove('is-copied');
            if (icon) icon.className = 'bi bi-quote';
          }, 1400);
        };
        if (navigator.clipboard && navigator.clipboard.writeText) {
          navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(done).catch(function () {});
        } else {
          const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
          ta.value = text; document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.select();
          try { document.execCommand('copy'); done(); } catch (e) {}
          document.body.removeChild(ta);
        }
      }
    });
  }

  apply();
})();
</script>
```
